all.notes: Without viewport meta, mobile clients may render at desktop width

message.en: No viewport meta tag found — mobile email clients may render the email at desktop width, requiring pinch-to-zoom.
message.fr: Aucune balise meta viewport trouvée — les clients email mobile pourraient afficher l'email à la largeur bureau, nécessitant un zoom.
message.es: No se encontró meta etiqueta viewport — los clientes email móviles podrían renderizar el email al ancho de escritorio, requiriendo zoom.
message.de: Kein Viewport-Meta-Tag gefunden — mobile E-Mail-Clients könnten die E-Mail in Desktop-Breite rendern, was Pinch-to-Zoom erfordert.
message.pt: Nenhuma meta tag viewport encontrada — clientes email móveis podem renderizar o email na largura desktop, exigindo zoom.

fix.en: Add in the <head>: <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
fix.fr: Ajouter dans le <head> : <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
fix.es: Agregar en el <head>: <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">

success_message.en: Viewport meta tag present — mobile rendering is properly configured.
success_message.fr: Balise meta viewport présente — le rendu mobile est correctement configuré.
success_message.es: Meta etiqueta viewport presente — el renderizado móvil está correctamente configurado.
success_message.de: Viewport-Meta-Tag vorhanden — Mobile-Rendering ist korrekt konfiguriert.
success_message.pt: Meta tag viewport presente — renderização mobile está corretamente configurada.
